[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001001010 3
1 1011001000 4
2 0010000000 1
3 0000000010 1
4 0001001110 4
5 1110111110 8
6 1010001000 3
7 0000000010 1

01 1010010010 4
12 0101001010 4
23 1111001101 7
34 0110110101 6
45 1100110101 6
56 1010010001 4
67 0101000110 4
70 0101000010 3

02 0000100111 4
13 0101111000 5
24 0110000111 5
35 0101111111 8
46 1001011011 6
57 0000101000 2
60 1111111011 9
71 0000101111 5

03 0000010101 3
14 1100110010 5
25 0101001101 5
36 0000010001 2
47 0011100010 4
50 1010010101 5
61 1010010110 5
72 1010011010 5

04 1001011111 7
15 1111111000 7
26 0000100011 3
37 1010101000 4
40 1001011111 7
51 1111111000 7
62 0000100011 3
73 1010101000 4

05 1010010101 5
16 1010010110 5
27 1010011010 5
30 0000010101 3
41 1100110010 5
52 0101001101 5
63 0000010001 2
74 0011100010 4

06 1111111011 9
17 0000101111 5
20 0000100111 4
31 0101111000 5
42 0110000111 5
53 0101111111 8
64 1001011011 6
75 0000101000 2

07 0101000010 3
10 1010010010 4
21 0101001010 4
32 1111001101 7
43 0110110101 6
54 1100110101 6
65 1010010001 4
76 0101000110 4
